response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role: no recent hands-on C++ development (only a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain background. The bulk of the career is in web/full-stack, DLang, and Node.js across unrelated industries.
strengths: Solid 10+ years of professional software engineering experience overall
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on developer tooling
Strong communication skills demonstrated via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ experience (only ~6 months a decade ago)
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development background

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and communication skills
